summary: Over the past year, the engineer focused heavily on building and maintaining a Telegram automation integration for n8n, developing a Windows file-tagging utility, and creating a custom GitHub profile CV generator. Additional work included personal Neovim configuration, a YOLO labeling tool, and a small contribution to a proxy client fork.

items.title: GitHub profile CV generator
items.description: Built a custom profile card system that generates a CV timeline and sidebar cards from repository activity.

items.title: Profile card workflow and rendering
items.description: Developed the automated workflow and card generator that produces the combined profile SVG and CV data.

items.title: Proxy client fork maintenance
items.description: Re-exposed internal API methods for a specific proxy client fork.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Iterated on CI reliability, authentication handling, and package publishing for the forked n8n Telegram integration.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the v2 release with documentation, a changelog, and store listing materials.

items.title: Personal Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a full IDE setup, migrating to newer Neovim APIs and adding remote session support.

items.title: On-host YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Started a minimalistic, fast labeling tool with batch operations and flexible data resolution.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Addressed session storage and client parameter issues in the Telegram integration.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Prepared the v2.0 release with metadata support and a privacy policy for store submission.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Laid the foundation for the forked integration, adding Docker deployment support and initial authentication work.

items.title: GitHub profile CV generator
items.description: Updated the profile repository with initial customizations.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Worked on the initial CLI, logging, and UI polish for the file-tagging project.

items.title: GitHub profile CV generator
items.description: Made early updates to the profile repository.
